name: Ezra Montague // Secret hubby
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

After a long pregnancy and getting used to parenthood, Ezra eventually had to get back to work.

Oh boy, he really couldn’t wait to get back home to his gorgeous baby and husband.
